Updates

v26.1

On this page

Bedrock Perfected 26.3 ​

INFO

Released on March 1, 2026.

It's been a month since the last major update for Bedrock Perfected — here's the March update!

This release is fairly large: it includes many new tweaks and mechanics and even a complete overhaul of earlier systems.

Revamped Biome Notifier ​

Some of you said the previous Biome Notifier felt annoying, so this update ships a revamped version.

The new notifier is smaller and uses quieter, improved sounds.

Don't worry, the new version is still compatible with custom biomes!

INFO

Shot with Biomes and Beyond add-on by iKorbon.

Settlement Mechanics ​

Ever wanted to show your city name to other players? Now you can — set a custom radius that notifies players when they enter your settlement.

To do this you need the new Scroll of the Hearth item.

Use the item to open this menu.

Click Add Settlement then fill out all the form to create your first settlement.

Details

Settlement ID is a unique identifier for your settlement; it cannot match an existing settlement ID.

Radius X and Radius Z is the length and width of your settlement.

Welcome Message is the small text at the top side of the notification.

Settlement Name is the big text at the bottom side of the notification.

Starter Kits ​

Ever think the start of your journey is too hard? Now you'll receive a starter kit when you begin!

Addon Configurations ​

Some of you asked for add-on options so you can pick which features to use — now that's available!

You can choose a theme in the subpacks menu — Default or Dark.

There's also the Addon Configuration item to manage which mechanics you want enabled or disabled. This configuration is per-player, not global.

Zombie Variations ​

Zombies are boring, aren't they? So let's spice them up by adding texture variations!

Golden Savanna ​

Savannas were getting dull — not anymore! The Savanna biome now has a better golden colors.

Clear Glass ​

All glass variants are clear now!



Fancier Sunflower ​

Since glass just got fancier, why not sunflowers? They do now!

Fully Grown Kelp ​

Don't leave kelp behind — it gets a new texture when fully grown!

Different Stems ​

The classic pumpkin-and-melon duo also get new stem textures — now they're distinct!

Darker Dark Oak Leaves ​

Dark Oak should be darker than Oak, right? We changed Dark Oak leaves so they're noticeably darker than Oak leaves.


No Vignette ​

Vignettes are annoying, right? We've removed them in this update.

Lower Shield ​

Shields block much of your screen even when unused, so we've lowered them for better visibility.

Sticky Piston Sides ​

We also changed the Sticky Piston side color to match its front texture.

Pink End Rods ​

The base of End Rods also got a texture change — they're pink now!

New Items ​

Finally, we've added the new items mentioned above along with their crafting recipes.

Scroll of the Hearth Item ​

An item to manage your settlement.

Addon Configuration Item ​

An item to configure which addon mechanics you want enabled or disabled.

That's it for 26.3 — see you next month with another major update!

Need help, want to suggest something, or found a bug? Join our Discord server here!
